products.name: Manifold
products.subtitle: Integrated Digital Modulator
products.description: Based on 12 parallel internal modulation modules with corresponding parameters, allowing free routing of modulation relationships between modules and input/output interfaces
products.specs:
128.5mm x 40.64mm
Eurorack width 8HP
Depth approx 24mm
Uses 10pin power connector
Includes reverse polarity protection
+12v 100ma
-12v 10ma
Based on Pico RP2040 platform
12 parallel internal modulation modules with corresponding parameters, allowing free routing of modulation relationships between modules and input/output interfaces
8khz 12bit output level range: 0-10V
8khz 12bit input level range: 0-10V

3x Gate input
3x CV input
6x Output

features.name: LFO
features.desc: Low-frequency oscillator with 0.1-20hz range, supporting five waveform selections

features.name: EG
features.desc: Envelope generator with voltage-controlled Decay and Release parameters

features.name: CLKDIV
features.desc: Clock divider supporting 1-16 division and 2^n division modes

features.name: Logic
features.desc: Logic module supporting AND, OR, NOT, YES operations

features.name: SNH
features.desc: Sample & hold module with integrated smoother and shaper

features.name: RNDOM
features.desc: Random module supporting probability trigger, random voltage, random glitch square wave, random noise

features.name: SEQ
features.desc: Generative CV sequencer that generates sequences based on max/min voltage and step length

features.name: Eucld
features.desc: Euclidean sequencer supporting offset, step length, and trigger step count parameters

features.name: ARP
features.desc: Arpeggiator supporting multiple chord types and arpeggio patterns

features.name: Beati
features.desc: Bit rhythm sequencer that generates rhythm patterns through binary bits

features.name: MIX
features.desc: Mixer supporting two input signal mixing with independent gain control

features.name: FADER
features.desc: Proportional fader for smooth crossfade between two input signals

features.name: VCA
features.desc: Voltage-controlled amplifier for processing relationships between CV signals

features.name: Invert
features.desc: Signal inverter with controllable inversion degree

features.name: Qunt
features.desc: Quantizer supporting multiple scale types and root note settings

features.name: OVERFL
features.desc: Stack overflow module, perfect for glitch effects

products.name: MIDI2CV MK2
products.subtitle: MIDI to CV Converter
products.description: Programmable Eurorack module synthesizer, perfect for pairing with drum machines, sequencers, and MIDI-equipped control keyboards
products.specs:
1xTrs Midi In (switchable Trs Type A/B via jumper)
1xClock with cc24 adjustable Clock Div x2 x3 x4... etc
2xNote/Gate/Vel (2 sets of note info, 3 jacks per set, 6 jacks total)
3xModWheel editable on your MIDI device
Vel can also be changed to CC info
Automatically switches to probability mode after 10 seconds of no MIDI signal

Width: 2HP
Depth: 50mm
Power Header: 10p/16p
+12v: 45ma
-12v: 0ma
+5v: 0ma

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
Programmable Eurorack module synthesizer
Perfect for pairing with drum machines, sequencers, and MIDI-equipped control keyboards
Automatically switches to probability mode after 10 seconds of no MIDI signal
Firmware version v4.1

products.name: ADSR Envelope
products.subtitle: Envelope Generator
products.description: Panel upgrade, circuit upgrade, LED with lamp post

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
Panel upgrade, circuit upgrade, LED with lamp post
Perfect for small systems, simple and reliable

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
KNIT is a compact redesign of Mutable Instruments Plaits
Available in black or white panel
Firmware is up-to-date with Plaits
Clone module for supporting new product development

products.name: 4CH-Mixer&Send
products.subtitle: Mixing Console with Send
products.description: Four-channel input, stereo output, headphone output
products.specs:
4 input channels
Channels I/II are stereo inputs
Channels III/IV are mono inputs
Channels I/II/III are sent to effects loop by default
Stereo send and stereo return jacks
Output supports headphones and stereo output
Includes 3P (L/R/Gnd) jumper header on the back

Width: 8HP
Depth: 28mm
Power Header: 10p/16p
+12v: 10ma
-12v: 10ma

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
Four-channel input, stereo output
Channels I/II are stereo inputs
Channels III/IV are mono inputs
Supports effects send and return
Output supports headphone output

products.name: Buffer Mult
products.subtitle: Active Buffer
products.specs:
3 sets of 1In2Out duplicators
Includes default routing
When In jack has no patch cable, automatically connects to previous input
Switchable to 1In 6Out or 1In 4Out & 1In 2Out or 1In 2Out x3

Width: 2HP
Depth: 35mm
Power Header: 10p/16p
+12v: 10ma
-12v: 10ma

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
2nd generation upgrade
3 sets of 1In2Out duplicators
Includes default routing
More flexible duplication control
Design your performance gestures through patching

products.name: VFAM
products.subtitle: DFAM Sync
products.specs:
1xExt Adv In external clock input
1xAdv Out connects to DFAM's adv/clock jack
1xRun/Stop button
1xStop button
1xRst button
1xSet 1 button

Width: 2HP
Depth: 40mm
Power Header: 10p/16p
+12v: 40ma
-12v: 0ma
+5v: 0ma

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
MOOG DFAM dedicated synchronizer
Solves the synchronization difficulty of DFAM step sequencer
Allows easy synchronization between DFAM and other modules
Reset/stop returns to locked step 1
Can also designate any step as step 1 at any time

products.name: MS-20 VCF
products.subtitle: Voltage-Controlled Filter
products.specs:
Based on Korg MS-20 filter
Features volts per octave (potentiometer adjustable on back panel)
Features gain overload knob with asymmetric clipping distortion
Features filter mode gradient knob

Width: 4HP
Depth: 28mm
Power Header: 10p
+12v: 10ma
-12v: 10ma

features.name: Overview
features.desc:
Classic filter circuit
Features volts per octave
Features gain overload knob
Asymmetric clipping distortion
Features filter mode gradient knob
